framing_note: This JSON is a pipeline-regression smoke baseline produced against the synthetic seed_smoke.sql fixture (9 facts / 9 entities / 15 memories tuned to the 12 canonical queries). Use these numbers as a regression gate on the retrieval pipeline wiring, NOT as a representative measurement of BrainCore's retrieval quality on arbitrary workloads. Do not cite relevance_at_10 (or any latency value) as a performance claim — the public README's headline retrieval metrics come from a separate production-corpus benchmark.
